title: Fluent Builder Pattern
description: Implement a fluent builder pattern for constructing complex objects with validation, supporting required and optional fields.
requirements: Class must be named 'User' with nested 'Builder' class
Implement optional fields: name, age, address
Implement build() that validates and returns User
User should be immutable (final fields, no setters)
Throw IllegalStateException for missing required fields

few_shot_examples.prompt: Create a basic builder with chained setters.
